strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI agent infrastructure work: MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, directly relevant to the AI strategy focus
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and as a public speaker and workshop creator, aligning with the 'inspire others' and intrapreneurial aspects of the role
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD in an AI-related field), which is a preferred qualification, and no evidence of formal AI/ML academic grounding

AI expertise is recent and narrow — MCP tooling at one employer since April 2025 — falling well short of the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale' the role expects

Current title and scope (Staff/Senior Software Developer) reflect an individual engineering contributor profile, not the director-level IC with industry-wide influence and strategic customer advisory experience the role requires

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth across software disciplines and clears the experience bar on years, and his recent pivot into AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling shows relevant initiative. However, the role is a director-level position requiring recognized, industry-visible AI expertise, a history of advising strategic customers, and the ability to shape cloud and AI product strategy at scale — none of which are substantiated in the resume. His AI work is too recent and too narrow, his seniority level is two or three rungs below what the role demands, and the absence of an advanced AI-related degree removes a preferred signal. He would be a stronger fit for a senior or staff AI-adjacent engineering role than for this principal strategy position.
